title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Lady Medical Officer
location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Island
shortInfo: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 notification is out for Lady Medical Officer vacancy on a contract basis. Candidates with MBBS qualification (as per NMC Norms) can directly attend the walk-in interview on 30 May 2026 at Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS). The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 86,000 per month.

basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences
basic_details.short_information: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 notification is out for Lady Medical Officer vacancy on a contract basis. Candidates with MBBS qualification (as per NMC Norms) can directly attend the walk-in interview on 30 May 2026 at Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS). The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 86,000 per month.
basic_details.job_location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Island

faq.question: What is the post name for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) recruitment is Lady Medical Officer.

faq.question: What is the qualification required for the Lady Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Lady Medical Officer position is MBBS as per NMC Norms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Lady Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Lady Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated monthly pay of Rs. 86,000/- per month.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in venue.

faq.question: Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Please refer to the official notification for the exact address.

faq.question: What is the official website of ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The official website of Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) is https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in.
